reviews.review_description:
Hello, I′m your neighbour, goodbye, I'll see you later
This place was not for you to look and see, take it from me
Hello, you′re in danger, good riddance to your behaviour
You may think I'm the devil and I wish your lives in peril
Let me spell this out for you; I'm just your neighbour
Now get out!
I love this game and I hope it becomes beta then ug and cosmetics are awesome 😎 and u hope they fixs some bugs and the game is peak 🎉

I don't know how meta let this slop on the store, I used to like turkeys and now they give me nightmares because of how bad this game was. It's like a 14 year old made it. Im not even angry, just disappointed, I'm going back to kick the tung tung
